creator: kobayasi@grove.kutc.kansai-u.ac.jp
text:
Now, I use cu command for serial console.
	But, in online manual of cu, there is no description of
	default baud rate for cu command. I have tried to make connection
	several times. I must use correct --speed command line option to
	make connection. 

	In source code, there is default setting for baud rate, 0L.

	Please add the description of default baud rate for cu command.

	Thanks in advance.
